member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.BarcodeFormat.UpcEanExtension
member.summary: UPC/EAN extension format. Not a stand-alone format.

member.name: P:ZXing.Net.Maui.BarcodeFormats.OneDimensional
member.summary: UPC_A | UPC_E | EAN_13 | EAN_8 | CODABAR | CODE_39 | CODE_93 | CODE_128 | ITF | RSS_14 | RSS_EXPANDED without MSI (to many false-positives) and IMB (not enough tested, and it looks more like a 2D)

member.name: T:ZXing.Net.Maui.BarcodeScanning
member.summary: Provides information about barcode scanning capabilities on the current device.

member.name: P:ZXing.Net.Maui.BarcodeScanning.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether barcode scanning is supported on this device. This checks if the device has a camera available. Check this property before using barcode scanning features to avoid runtime exceptions on devices without cameras.

member.name: P:ZXing.Net.Maui.CameraManager.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether barcode scanning is supported on this device.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.Other
member.summary: Unspecified, application-specific metadata. Maps to an unspecified {@link Object}.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.Orientation
member.summary: Denotes the likely approximate orientation of the barcode in the image. This value is given as degrees rotated clockwise from the normal, upright orientation. For example a 1D barcode which was found by reading top-to-bottom would be said to have orientation "90". This key maps to an {@link Integer} whose value is in the range [0,360).

summary.p: 2D barcode formats typically encode text, but allow for a sort of 'byte mode' which is sometimes used to encode binary data. While {@link Result} makes available the complete raw bytes in the barcode for these formats, it does not offer the bytes from the byte segments alone.
This maps to a {@link java.util.List} of byte arrays corresponding to the raw bytes in the byte segments in the barcode, in order.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.ErrorCorrectionLevel
member.summary: Error correction level used, if applicable. The value type depends on the format, but is typically a String.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.IssueNumber
member.summary: For some periodicals, indicates the issue number as an {@link Integer}.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.SuggestedPrice
member.summary: For some products, indicates the suggested retail price in the barcode as a formatted {@link String}.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.PossibleCountry
member.summary: For some products, the possible country of manufacture as a {@link String} denoting the ISO country code. Some map to multiple possible countries, like "US/CA".

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.UpcEanExtension
member.summary: For some products, the extension text

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.StructuredAppendSequence
member.summary: If the code format supports structured append and the current scanned code is part of one then the sequence number is given with it.

member.name: F:ZXing.Net.Maui.MetadataType.StructuredAppendParity
member.summary: If the code format supports structured append and the current scanned code is part of one then the parity is given with it.

member.name: P:ZXing.Net.Maui.BarcodeBitmapRenderer.ForegroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the foreground color.

member.name: M:ZXing.Net.Maui.ByteBufferYUVLuminanceSource.#ctor(Java.Nio.ByteBuffer,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ZXing.Net.Maui.ByteBufferYUVLuminanceSource.getRow(System.Int32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Fetches one row of luminance data from the underlying platform's bitmap. Values range from 0 (black) to 255 (white). Because Java does not have an unsigned byte type, callers will have to bitwise and with 0xff for each value. It is preferable for implementations of this method to only fetch this row rather than the whole image, since no 2D Readers may be installed and getMatrix() may never be called.
member.param: The row to fetch, 0 <= y < Height.
An optional preallocated array. If null or too small, it will be ignored. Always use the returned object, and ignore the .length of the array.
member.returns: An array containing the luminance data of the requested row.

member.name: M:ZXing.Net.Maui.ByteBufferYUVLuminanceSource.crop(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a new object with cropped image data. Implementations may keep a reference to the original data rather than a copy. Only callable if CropSupported is true.
member.param: The width of the rectangle to crop.
The height of the rectangle to crop.
member.returns: A cropped version of this object.

member.name: T:ZXing.Net.MAUI.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
